---
title: "Contact"
---

## Email

The fastest way to reach me is by email. Write to **andrewrosenberg [at] ufl dot edu** — translate the brackets and "dot" into a normal address before sending.

## Address

::: {.address-grid}
::: {.address-col}
**Office**\
333 Anderson Hall\
University of Florida\
Gainesville, FL 32611
:::

::: {.address-col}
**Mailing address**\
University of Florida\
Department of Political Science\
234 Anderson Hall\
P.O. Box 117325\
Gainesville, FL 32611
:::
:::

```{=html}
<div class="map-wrap">
<iframe
  src="https://www.openstreetmap.org/export/embed.html?bbox=-82.3450%2C29.6495%2C-82.3390%2C29.6535&layer=mapnik&marker=29.6515774%2C-82.3418860"
  loading="lazy"
  title="Anderson Hall, University of Florida"></iframe>
<p class="map-attribution"><a href="https://www.openstreetmap.org/?mlat=29.6515774&amp;mlon=-82.3418860#map=18/29.6515774/-82.3418860" target="_blank" rel="noopener">View larger map</a> · © OpenStreetMap contributors</p>
</div>
```
